dashboard.label: Wellness
dashboard.description: Vendor-neutral vitals (SpO2, temperature, HRV, respiration) and recovery (readiness, resilience, sleep-time) — Wearables data model
dashboard.definition:
{"title":"Wellness","description":"SpO2, body temperature, HRV and sleep timing trends","defaults":{"dataSources":{"ds.search":{"options":{"queryParameters":{"latest":"$global_time.latest$","earliest":"$global_time.earliest$"}}}},"visualizations":{"global":{"showProgressBar":true}}},"inputs":{"input_global_trp":{"type":"input.timerange","options":{"token":"global_time","defaultValue":"-14d@d,now"},"title":"Time Range"},"input_person":{"type":"input.dropdown","title":"Person (temp)","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_person_list"},"options":{"token":"person","defaultValue":"*","items":[{"label":"All people","value":"*"}]},"encoding":{"value":"primary.person_id","label":"primary.person_name"}}},"dataSources":{"ds_spo2_latest":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=spo2 person_id="$person$" | sort -_time | head 1 | eval spo2_avg=round(spo2_avg,1), spo2color=case(spo2_avg>=95,"#4CAF50",spo2_avg>=90,"#F4A422",true(),"#E8503A") | table spo2_avg, spo2color","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"SpO2 — latest"},"ds_temp_latest":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=readiness person_id="$person$" | sort -_time | head 1 | eval temp_dev=round(temp_deviation,2), temp_trend=round(temp_trend_deviation,2), tempcolor=case(abs(temp_dev)<=0.5,"#4CAF50",abs(temp_dev)<=1.0,"#F4A422",true(),"#E8503A") | table temp_dev, temp_trend, tempcolor","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Skin temp — latest"},"ds_hrv_latest":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=readiness person_id="$person$" | sort -_time | head 1 | eval hrv_bal=round(hrv_balance,0) | table hrv_bal","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"HRV balance — latest"},"ds_breath_latest":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_sleep sleep_type=long_sleep person_id="$person$" | dedup day sortby -total_sleep_min | sort -_time | head 1 | eval avg_breath=round(respiration_avg,1) | table avg_breath","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Breath rate — latest"},"ds_spo2_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=spo2 person_id="$person$" | dedup day | eval spo2_avg=round(spo2_avg,2) | timechart span=1d@d avg(spo2_avg) as "SpO2 %""},"name":"SpO2 trend"},"ds_temp_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=readiness person_id="$person$" | dedup day | eval temp_dev=round(temp_deviation,2) | timechart span=1d@d avg(temp_dev) as "Temp Deviation""},"name":"Skin temp deviation trend"},"ds_hrv_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=readiness person_id="$person$" | dedup day | eval hrv=round(hrv_balance,0) | timechart span=1d@d avg(hrv) as "HRV Balance""},"name":"HRV balance trend"},"ds_readiness_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=readiness person_id="$person$" | dedup day | timechart span=1d@d avg(readiness_score) as Readiness"},"name":"Readiness score trend"},"ds_sleep_time":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=sleep_time person_id="$person$" | dedup day | where isnotnull(sleep_time_recommendation) AND sleep_time_recommendation!="null" | sort -_time | head 7 | eval recommendation=replace(sleep_time_recommendation,"_"," "), status=replace(sleep_time_status,"_"," ") | table day, recommendation, status","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-14d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Sleep time recommendations"},"ds_readiness_contributors_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=readiness person_id="$person$" | dedup day | timechart span=1d@d avg(readiness_contrib_body_temp) as "Body Temp", avg(hrv_balance) as "HRV Balance", avg(readiness_contrib_resting_hr) as "Resting HR", avg(readiness_contrib_recovery_index) as "Recovery""},"name":"Readiness contributors trend"},"ds_resilience_latest":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=resilience person_id="$person$" | sort -_time | head 1 | eval Level=upper(substr(resilience_level,1,1)).substr(resilience_level,2), rcolor=case(resilience_level="limited","#E8503A",resilience_level="adequate","#E8843A",resilience_level="solid","#F4A422",resilience_level="strong","#4CAF50",resilience_level="exceptional","#4CAF50",true(),"#8a93a0") | table Level, rcolor","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-45d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Resilience level — latest"},"ds_resilience_contrib":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=resilience person_id="$person$" | sort -_time | head 1 | eval "Sleep Recovery"=round(resilience_contrib_sleep_recovery,0), "Daytime Recovery"=round(resilience_contrib_daytime_recovery,0), "Stress"=round(resilience_contrib_stress,0) | table "Sleep Recovery","Daytime Recovery","Stress" | transpose | rename column as contributor, "row 1" as score","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-45d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Resilience contributors"},"ds_resilience_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=resilience person_id="$person$" | dedup day | timechart span=1d@d latest(resilience_contrib_sleep_recovery) as "Sleep Recovery", latest(resilience_contrib_daytime_recovery) as "Daytime Recovery", latest(resilience_contrib_stress) as "Stress"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}},"name":"Resilience contributors trend"},"ds_person_list":{"type":"ds.search","name":"People for the picker (registry)","options":{"query":"| inputlookup wearable_person_profile | eval person_name=coalesce(person_name, person_id) | sort person_name | table person_id person_name"}}},"visualizations":{"spo2_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_spo2_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"spo2_avg","majorColor":"> primary | seriesByName('spo2color') | lastPoint()","majorFontSize":72,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('spo2_avg')","label":"SpO2","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":"%","unitPosition":"after","align":"left"},"title":"Blood Oxygen (SpO2)"},"temp_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_temp_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"temp_dev","majorColor":"> primary | seriesByName('tempcolor') | lastPoint()","majorFontSize":48,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('temp_dev')","label":"Temp Deviation","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" C","unitPosition":"after","align":"left"},"title":"Skin Temp Deviation"},"temp_trend_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_temp_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"temp_trend","majorColor":"#4CAF50","majorFontSize":48,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('temp_trend')","label":"Temp Trend","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" C","unitPosition":"after","align":"left"},"title":"Temp Trend"},"hrv_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_hrv_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"hrv_bal","majorColor":"#A78BFA","majorFontSize":48,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('hrv_bal')","label":"HRV Balance","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","align":"left"},"title":"HRV Balance Score"},"breath_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_breath_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"avg_breath","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","majorFontSize":48,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('avg_breath')","label":"Avg Breath","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" rpm","unitPosition":"after","align":"left"},"title":"Avg Breath Rate"},"spo2_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","title":"SpO2 Trend","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_spo2_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#4CAF50"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisMin":90,"yAxisMax":100,"yAxisTitle":"SpO2 %"}},"temp_trend_line":{"type":"splunk.area","title":"Skin Temperature Deviation Trend","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_temp_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#4CAF50"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisTitle":"Deviation (C)"}},"hrv_trend_line":{"type":"splunk.line","title":"HRV Balance Trend","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_hrv_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#A78BFA"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100,"yAxisTitle":"HRV Balance Score"}},"readiness_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","title":"Readiness Score Trend","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_readiness_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#4CAF50"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100,"yAxisTitle":"Score"}},"recovery_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","title":"Readiness Contributors Trend","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_readiness_contributors_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#4CAF50","#A78BFA","#E8503A","#F4A422"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"bottom","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100,"yAxisTitle":"Score"}},"sleep_time_table":{"type":"splunk.table","title":"Sleep Time Recommendations (Last 7 Days)","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_time"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","headerBackgroundColor":"#2D3250","rowBackgroundColors":"> table | seriesByIndex(0) | pick(tableAltRowBackgroundColorsByBackgroundColor)","tableAltRowBackgroundColorsByBackgroundColor":[{"value":"#1A1D2E","to":"#232640"}]}},"resilience_level_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_resilience_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"Level","majorColor":"> primary | seriesByName('rcolor') | lastPoint()","majorFontSize":36,"label":"Resilience","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> primary | seriesByName('Level') | lastPoint()","align":"left"},"title":"Resilience"},"resilience_contrib_bar":{"type":"splunk.bar","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_resilience_contrib"},"options":{"xAxisField":"contributor","seriesColors":["#8B7FB0"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","showRoundedBars":true,"legendDisplay":"off","showDataLabels":"all","yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100},"title":"Resilience Contributors"},"resilience_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_resilience_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#7B56DB","#009CEB","#DD9900"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"bottom","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisTitle":"Score"},"title":"Resilience Contributors Trend"},"vitals_guide":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","markdown":"### About these vitals
- **Blood Oxygen (SpO2)** — % oxygen in your blood overnight; ~95–100% is typical.
- **Skin Temp Deviation** — how far last night's skin temperature sat from your baseline (°C); large swings can flag illness or cycle changes.
- **HRV Balance** — heart-rate variability vs your baseline; steady/high = well recovered.
- **Avg Breath Rate** — average breaths per minute during sleep.

**Learn more:** [your device — Readiness Contributors](https://support.ouraring.com/hc/en-us/articles/360057791533-Readiness-Contributors)"}},"recovery_guide":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","markdown":"### About recovery
- **Readiness Score** — your device's daily estimate of how recovered you are (0–100).
- **Readiness Contributors** — signals your device blends into readiness (body temp, HRV balance, resting HR, recovery index).
- **Resilience** — longer-term capacity to handle stress (limited → exceptional), from recovery + stress balance.
- **Sleep Time Recommendations** — your device's suggested bedtime window and whether you followed it.

**Learn more:** [your device — Readiness](https://support.ouraring.com/hc/en-us/articles/360025589793-Readiness-Score) · [Resilience](https://support.ouraring.com/hc/en-us/articles/25358829055251-Resilience)"}}},"layout":{"options":{},"globalInputs":["input_global_trp","input_person"],"tabs":{"items":[{"layoutId":"layout_1","label":"Vitals"},{"layoutId":"layout_2","label":"Recovery"}]},"layoutDefinitions":{"layout_1":{"type":"absolute","structure":[{"item":"spo2_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":20,"w":280,"h":200}},{"item":"temp_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":320,"y":20,"w":220,"h":200}},{"item":"temp_trend_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":560,"y":20,"w":220,"h":200}},{"item":"hrv_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":800,"y":20,"w":220,"h":200}},{"item":"breath_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":1040,"y":20,"w":220,"h":200}},{"item":"spo2_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":240,"w":440,"h":260}},{"item":"temp_trend_line","type":"block","position":{"x":480,"y":240,"w":440,"h":260}},{"item":"hrv_trend_line","type":"block","position":{"x":940,"y":240,"w":480,"h":260}},{"item":"vitals_guide","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":520,"w":1400,"h":190}}],"options":{"width":1440,"height":730,"display":"auto","backgroundImage":{"x":0,"y":0,"src":"/static/app/oura_health/bg_health.svg","sizeType":"cover"}}},"layout_2":{"type":"absolute","options":{"width":1440,"height":790,"display":"auto","backgroundImage":{"x":0,"y":0,"src":"/static/app/oura_health/bg_health.svg","sizeType":"cover"}},"structure":[{"item":"readiness_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":20,"w":440,"h":260}},{"item":"recovery_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":480,"y":20,"w":440,"h":260}},{"item":"sleep_time_table","type":"block","position":{"x":940,"y":20,"w":480,"h":260}},{"item":"resilience_level_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":300,"w":240,"h":260}},{"item":"resilience_contrib_bar","type":"block","position":{"x":280,"y":300,"w":560,"h":260}},{"item":"resilience_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":860,"y":300,"w":560,"h":260}},{"item":"recovery_guide","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":580,"w":1400,"h":190}}]}}}}
